---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="serene-home">

  <section class="serene-hero">
    <div class="serene-hero-overlay">
      <div class="serene-topbar-space"></div>
      <div class="serene-hero-center">
        <h1 class="serene-site-title">Sophia Sufei Chen</h1>
        <p class="serene-site-subtitle">Business Studies · Analysis · Professional Development</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="serene-intro">
    <div class="serene-intro-image placeholder-block">Portrait Image</div>
    <div class="serene-intro-copy">
      <h2>About Me</h2>
      <p>
        This section can introduce your academic background, interests, and professional direction. Replace this placeholder text later with your own content.
      </p>
      <p>
        You can also use this area to explain your studies, strengths, and future goals in a concise and professional way.
      </p>
      <a href="about.html" class="serene-outline-btn">Show More</a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="serene-feature-strip">
    <article class="serene-feature-card placeholder-image-block">
      <div class="serene-image-placeholder">Research Image</div>
      <div class="serene-feature-label">Research</div>
    </article>
    <article class="serene-feature-card placeholder-image-block">
      <div class="serene-image-placeholder">Teaching Image</div>
      <div class="serene-feature-label">Teaching</div>
    </article>
    <article class="serene-feature-card placeholder-image-block">
      <div class="serene-image-placeholder">Arts Image</div>
      <div class="serene-feature-label">Arts</div>
    </article>
  </section>

  <section class="serene-news-banner">
    <div class="serene-news-overlay">
      <div class="serene-news-box">
        <h2>News</h2>
        <p>
          Use this area for updates, activities, achievements, or recent highlights. You can later link this section to another page if needed.
        </p>
      </div>
      <a href="projects.html" class="serene-banner-btn">Show More</a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <footer class="serene-footer">
    <div class="serene-footer-big">CONTACT</div>
    <div class="serene-footer-big">ME</div>

    <div class="serene-footer-meta">
      <div>
        <p class="serene-footer-label">Email</p>
        <p>your.email@example.com</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="serene-footer-label">Phone</p>
        <p>+353 xxx xxx xxx</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="serene-footer-label">Links</p>
        <p>LinkedIn · CV · Portfolio</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="serene-footer-label">Navigation</p>
        <p>Home · About · Projects · Reflection</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </footer>

</section>
```
